inputs.label: Total Days
inputs.businessContext: Total number of days to be converted into weeks.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of days to be converted into weeks.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Tage, die in Wochen umgerechnet werden sollen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de jours à convertir en semaines.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de días a convertir en semanas.

inputs.label: Days per Week
inputs.businessContext: Standard number of days per week for the conversion (e.g., 7 for calendar weeks, 5 for work weeks).

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard number of days per week for the conversion (e.g., 7 for calendar weeks, 5 for work weeks).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüşüm için haftadaki standart gün sayısı (ör. takvim haftaları için 7, iş haftaları için 5).
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardanzahl Tage pro Woche für die Umrechnung (z. B. 7 für Kalenderwochen, 5 für Arbeitswochen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre standard de jours par semaine pour la conversion (ex. : 7 pour les semaines calendaires, 5 pour les semaines de travail).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número estándar de días por semana para la conversión (ej. 7 para semanas calendario, 5 para semanas laborales).

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the primary output (weeks).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the primary output (weeks).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ana çıktı (hafta) için ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die primäre Ausgabe (Wochen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour le résultat principal (semaines).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para el resultado principal (semanas).

inputs.label: Show Remainder Days
inputs.businessContext: Set to 1 to include the breakdown of full weeks and remainder days; 0 to output only decimal weeks.

businessContext_i18n.en: Set to 1 to include the breakdown of full weeks and remainder days; 0 to output only decimal weeks.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tam haftalar ve kalan günlerin dökümünü dahil etmek için 1, yalnızca ondalık hafta çıktısı için 0.
businessContext_i18n.de: Auf 1 setzen, um die Aufschlüsselung in volle Wochen und Resttage einzuschließen; 0, um nur Dezimalwochen auszugeben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mettre à 1 pour inclure la décomposition en semaines complètes et jours restants ; 0 pour afficher uniquement les semaines décimales.
businessContext_i18n.es: Establecer en 1 para incluir el desglose de semanas completas y días restantes; 0 para mostrar solo semanas decimales.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
